2023-24 Grand Canyon Antelopes Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 30-5 (17-3, 1st in WAC MBB)

Coach: Bryce Drew

PS/G: 79.1 (49th of 362)

PA/G: 67.0 (47th of 362)

SRS: 10.45 (64th of 362)

SOS: -0.52 (146th of 362)

ORtg: 112.9 (47th of 362)

DRtg: 95.6 (11th of 362)

NCAA Tournament: (#12 seed in West)
Won West First Round (75-66) versus #5 Saint Mary's
Lost West Second Round (72-61) versus #4 Alabama

  • WAC Reg Season Champ
  • WAC Tourney Champ
